name: Simulator of Countries
short_description: This game is a global strategy game that gives you the opportunity to play for countries in the modern world. Here you will be given a choice of 198 countries for which you can play.
detailed_description: This game is a global strategy game. Here you can choose a country and play for it. You will be able to capture countries and expand with this. Also, thanks to the annual setting of your budget, you will regulate the amount of money that will be allocated to the population, infrastructure and education. For free money, you can build factories thanks to which you can collect an army and capture other countries, as well as prevent yourself from being captured.
about_the_game: This game is a global strategy game. Here you can choose a country and play for it. You will be able to capture countries and expand with this. Also, thanks to the annual setting of your budget, you will regulate the amount of money that will be allocated to the population, infrastructure and education. For free money, you can build factories thanks to which you can collect an army and capture other countries, as well as prevent yourself from being captured.
supported_languages:
English*, Ukrainian*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Turkish*, Japanese*, Thai*
*languages with full audio support
